title: Vault GUI Upgrade
description: A client-side visual upgrade to some Vault Hunters tables
body:
This is a client-side addon to the Vault Hunters modpack that adds an animation in the Card Essence Extractor GUI as well as rendering the card above the slot. This is simply a visual addon, it adds no functionality to the blocks it affects.

More is planned for this addon, including upgrades to the Black Market and Bounty Table GUIs

_Art by Kumara22, Developed by attackeight for Millennium VHSMP_
